name: Cajun Dressing for Turkey - Slc
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope instant chicken noodle soup mix (1.15 ounce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage in a Dutch oven, stirring to crumble.
2. Drain the sausage.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and stir well.
4. Place the mixture in a lightly greased 12-inch x 8-inch x 2-inch baking dish.
5. Cover and bake at 350 degrees F for 1 hour until moisture is absorbed.
6. Yield: 8 servings.
The Southern Living Cookbook Compiled & edited by Susan Carlisle Payne. Oxmoor House, 1987 ISBN 8987-0709-5 Typos by Jeff Pruett.
